## :bulb: About

Hello! My name is Wisam Orabi, and I am a senior software engineer. All the badges are clickable - Please have a look around and feel free to explore my repositories!


#### Backend

## :building_construction: Selected Open Source Projects

#### Medex - Pharmacy Delivery System

[![Java](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Java&color=important&logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://www.java.com/en)
[![Jersey](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Jersey&color=important&logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://eclipse-ee4j.github.io/jersey)
[![AWS](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=AWS&color=282c3c&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,)](https://aws.amazon.com)
[![MySQL](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=MySQL&color=3D6488&logo=mySQL&logoColor=white)](https://www.mysql.com)
[![Android Studio](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Android%20Studio&color=40dc84&logo=android&logoColor=white)](https://developer.android.com/studio)
[![Repository 1](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=medex-shopping-microservice&color=black&logo=github)](https://www.github.com/wisamorabi/medex-shopping-microservice)
[![Repository 2](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=medex-pharmacy-microservice&color=black&logo=github)](https://www.github.com/wisamorabi/medex-pharmacy-microservice)
[![Repository 3](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=medex-personnel-microservice&color=black&logo=github)](https://www.github.com/wisamorabi/medex-personnel-microservice)
[![Repository 4](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=medex-doctor-microservice&color=black&logo=github)](https://www.github.com/wisamorabi/medex-doctor-microservice)
[![Repository 5](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=medex-android-app&color=black&logo=github)](https://www.github.com/wisamorabi/medex-android-app)  
A Java full stack microservices-based medicine delivery service deployed on AWS.
<br><br>

#### Visual Maze Solver

[![C++](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=C%2B%2B&color=3F78A9&logo=cplusplus)](https://www.cplusplus.com)
[![Repository](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=maze-solver&color=black&logo=github)](https://www.github.com/wisamorabi/maze-solver)  
A DFS/BFS visual maze solver written in C++, utilizing STL data structures.
<br/><br/>

#### Bozo's Revenge - Arduino-Based Reflex Game

[![C++](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=C%2B%2B&color=3F78A9&logo=cplusplus)](https://www.cplusplus.com)
[![Arduino](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Arduino&color=377F83&logo=arduino&logoColor=white)](https://www.arduino.cc)
[![Java](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Java&color=important&logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://www.java.com/en)
[![Repository](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=bozos-revenge&color=black&logo=github)](https://www.github.com/wisamorabi/bozos-revenge)
[![Demo](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Demo&color=ff0404&logo=youtube)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EYyUOU9vF-Y)  
A game which challenges the player's reflexes by playing sound cues which the player should react to in time in order to gain points.
<br><br>

<ins>The code for the following projects is available upon request:</ins>
#### Covid-19 Tracer – Android App

[![Java](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Java&color=important&logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://www.java.com/en)
[![Firebase](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Firebase&color=red&logo=firebase)](https://firebase.google.com)
[![Android Studio](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Android%20Studio&color=40dc84&logo=android&logoColor=white)](https://developer.android.com/studio)  
[![Demo](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Demo&color=ff0404&logo=youtube)](https://youtube.com/watch?v=ur-_Cj8LNoc)  
An Android app utilizing Google Maps API & Firebase for Covid-19 contact tracing.
<br><br>

#### Dashing Pixels - Android Game

[![C#](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=C%23&color=AF7cdc&logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/csharp)

A monetized game on the Playstore I made in my free time.
No longer available on the Play Store due to Google's SDK compliance requirements.
